title: ResolvedSkinParams
description: Output contract for the platform-ui.skin.resolve-prompt LLM skill — converts natural language into deterministic OKLCH seed parameters.

seed.description: Primary hex color; OKLCH lightness 0.35–0.55, chroma ≤ 0.25, contrast vs white ≥ 4.5:1

accent_hint.description: Optional secondary hue for two-concept prompts. Must differ from seed by ≥ 30° in OKLCH hue.
